review_text: The place is clean and nice, the staff is friendly and helpful even though they are alone but quite efficient, it would be better if there were more staff, bringing a 1-year-old toddler is safe because the cold is pleasant, the location is close to the lake, it takes a 5-minute walk to get there, and around there are many beautiful vegetable and fruit gardens, thank you for the complimentary drinks, very helpful 🙏🏻

Nice concept of staying, very clean, not so noisy. Near to Buyan Lake. I think the best time of atay here is on weekdays, because we have a really good time since no one else staying and there were only us. Love it. Recommended!!

Stayed for 2 days here on New Year's Eve. Everything is very very perfect. I've stayed 2 times before. Will come back here again next!!! Staff is very friendly and also the owner!! Thanks. For sure will come back here again next time!
A unique, clean, and comfortable hotel where we visited with family, everything was enjoyable.
The staff service is very good, the cleanliness is also very good, but the price is a bit expensive.

This place is really close to Bali Farm House, very clean, delicious food and quite affordable, you can get free hot drinks at the reception like chocolate, tea, and coffee, friendly staff, they also have a hairdryer, it's very complete.

Comfortable place, all staff are friendly and very helpful. 

The owner is very helpful and responsive in answering questions. 

Highly recommended to come back here again.

This place is nice, but maybe it just needs to be more viral, and the Wi-Fi quality might need to be improved because the room areas are not far apart but the connection in the rooms is not so good. Overall, it's good, good luck!

Initially, I was scrolling through Agoda looking for a place to stay and found this unique container model. I liked staying here; overall, it was great, and the staff were very friendly. I checked in very late at night and was really well taken care of. It’s a must to come here, and I definitely have to come back again.

The interior has quite a few issues, such as a socket that has come loose and only one that still works, and the TV has problems; I requested to have it fixed at night, but there was no one available. I think for the price of the room, a smart TV is reasonable. The facilities are standard, and the cleanliness, especially in the toilet, is somewhat lacking. It's not a bad smell, but the grime is bothersome and unpleasant to look at.
Staff were very friendly and helpful. The garden is great for chilling out at night reading or having a drink. Containers are clean, modern and quite spacious. Thank you
A comfortable place to rest and enjoy the nature of Bedugul. Clean room. Kusuma, friendly staff who are ready to help.

Good and worth for money 
Good for staff He Is very good.
Nice concept, no need AC, is fresh inside and so outside:)
thank you to upgrade the room for kids. Thank you and wish you lucky
The room is clean, the staff is friendly, the view is nice but somewhat blocked by the neighbor's garden roof. The price is very cozy, the atmosphere is new and different from others.
A clean, comfortable, and quiet place, with friendly and attentive staff. Free campfire available if needed. Free tea/coffee.

Cleanliness is not really good, smelly sheet
but overal stay is fine compare to the price is very budget in bedugul area.
location is very easy to access and next to local people village
The containers condition is NEW, I like the garden area so much! Is very clean and peaceful
It is suitable for the budget stay and staffs are very co-operative they helped us to check-in at 11:30PM and we did a midnight check-out of 1:00AM they were very polite.
The floor at the side of the bed near the wall is dirty. Hope the staff will notice it. Except for that, everything is awesome, love the garden, the water dispenser, and the Korean tv channel 😁
A very comfortable and clean place. Good and friendly service. We highly recommend this hotel.

This is the second time we had our staycation here, we had a barbeque night too, so peacefull at night, the staff was helpfull, will be back again and again.
I just want to say thank you. Overall very good!! We will come back again soon!
Clean place, near all attract ion

Loving my stay here! The room has a view to the lake. It’s compact, but very cozy, clean and has everything you need for the night!

La estancia ha sido muy gratificante.bbuena limpieza, habitación amplia, agua muy caliente y el personal muy agradable.
La única pega, es que el alquiler de la moto es caro, aunque no dependan del alojamiento.

El personal fue muy amable.
La habitacion esta ok, pero no hay toma de corriente al lado de la cama. En la ducha habia mucho moho. 
El wifi casi que no funciono.
Chambre très simple mais ça suffit, petit déjeuner que du salé par contre, personnel adorable et très serviable, proche du joli lac

Die Besitzer des CSS sind unglaublich zuvorkommend und hilfsbereit! Der Container war 100% sauber und gemütlich. Die Dusche hat auch warmes Wasser. Der Ausblick ist sehr schön und die Lage angenehm ruhig. Gerne wieder!
Durch die Bergluft ist alles ein bisschen feucht und muffig. Es wir nachts durch die dünnen wände sehr kalt. Das Personal ist super nett und für ein zwei Nächte ist es eine gute Unterkunft
Waren zur Durchreise für eine Nacht dort. Für 2-3 Nächte mit leichtem Gepäck  ganz gut ! Super Personal!Wasserfälle und Tempel in der Nähe 😙

Sungguh menyenangkan menginap di CSS , tempatnya inovatif dan pemandangan sekitar yang indah.
Tak lupa staffnya jg ramah
Tempat bersih..staf ramah..akses jalan baik...cuma didalam kamar..kalau panas panas banget..pas dingin dingin banget.hehe..sempat closed eror
Agak unik kamar container dg udara dingin di sekitar tanpa ac...kamar bersih.. lokasi Strategis... Harga affordable

Ada pengunjung yang membatalkan karena kondisi nya masih harus berbenah
1. Tidak ada nya AC, sehingga kalau siang hari kamarnya hangat, kalau malam dingin sekali antara 15 - 16 derajat
2. Dinding container tidak ada penyekat dinding tambahan, sehingga suara atau suhu luar langsung masuk kedalam dan jika malam hari sangat dingin sekali, apa lagi jika tangan langsung menyentuh dinding besi container yang menempel dengan tempat tidur.
3. Kamar mandi kurang rapi, karena tidak ada keramik, baik lantai maupun dindingnya,
Indah, nyaman, stafnya ramah

Pas datang akses jalan menuju hotel tertutup lumpur longsor pada jarak kurang lebih 150m, minta tolong sama yang punya hotel tidak ada solusi sampai kami jalan kaki melewati lumpur, setelah sampai penginapan dibantu ambil barang ke mobil yang terparkir jauh karena tidak bisa melewati lumpur, kebetulan ibu saya ikut jadi jumlah orang dewasa 5 orang, kami pesan 2 kamar diminta tambahan 150ribu, tidak dikasih kasur tambahan, uang tambahan 150 nya buat apa coba? Kalau tidurnya disatu ranjang juga, sangat kecewa sih
2 staffnya sangat sigap melayani. Lokasi cocok untuk staycation jauh dari hingar-bingar kota.
Puas nginap di sini, ownernya sangat ramah skali

Unik dan punya potensi bagus, tapi utk saat ini masih jauh dari sempurna. Sy pindah kamar 2x, yg pertama gara2 saluran TV error, yg kedua gara2 kasur basah karena jendela tidak ditutup. Berakhir di kmar lain dgn kondisi lantai kayu di kamar mandi berjamur. Pengelola nya sangat ramah, tapi maaf utk kualitas hotelnya tidak sebanding dgn rate yg diberikan.
So far so good 🙂👍

Необычный формат жилья. Комнаты чистые, маленькие, но уютные. Внутри чистенько. Отопления и кондиционеров нет, но есть горячий душ с хорошим напором. Бесплатные горячие напитки, настольные игры, красивый вид и горный воздух.
The staff was very nice, the room was very original and clean. Beds were very confortable. Thank you!
